name_en: Top-tier original set with full packaging
name_cn:
Top-tier original set with full packaging
❤️❤️Lady D-Joy Medium, Embroidered Tassel Black, with sheepskin lining. The tassel is meticulously crafted, and the entire body is adorned with hand-embroidered matching mini beads, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. Adorned with a light gold-finished metal D.I.O.R. charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. The medium size features a detachable chain strap and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, making it ideal for daily wear. Dimensions: 26 x 13.5 x 5 cm
